2023-12-08 USA

USA - Christmas 2023 (Guayaquil/Cuenca/Baltimore)

New Years 2024 - Baltimore

After leaving Ecuador, we flew to the US to spend New Year's with Rachel's family.

We brought pan de yuca, cassava bread from Ecuador for Rachel's family to try
Trying Ecuadorian food
With our ornaments, gifts from Sebastián's mom
Playing games with the family
Celebrating New Year's
Playing games with the family
Rachel, Caroline, and Anne went downtown Baltimore and toured an old ship
The ship!

We did an escape room with Rachel's family, and won!
We did an escape room with Rachel's family, and won!

Celebration

As many close friends weren't able to come to our wedding, we were grateful to have time to celebrate with everyone while in Baltimore.

Many close family friends from Rachel's church came over to talk, play games, and celebrate
Many close family friends from Rachel's church came over to talk, play games, and celebrate
Rachel's good friend from high school
Chatting in the kitchen
Playing games
Dog sleeping through the commotion
Jonathan preparing food
